audit_items.proof_trace: All pointer dereferences in the file are guarded: `cntl` is always non-null because `RpcController::_impl` is initialized with `new RpcControllerImpl()` in the constructor; `MockTestHelper::GlobalInstance()` returns the address of a static local (never null); `WaitEvent` is set at L94 before the async call starts at L147, so DoneCallback cannot observe a null WaitEvent; `GetCallbackThreadGroup()` is reset only after `Stop()` drains the work thread queue first, preventing DoneCallback from being enqueued after the reset. SCHECK macros at L86 and L174 handle programmer-error null cases (wrong controller type) by aborting the process, which is the intended contract for internal API misuse.
